chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2015 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.100035/2018 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 17.04.2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar associate of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< For the time being, learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
